notes: All 9 responses correctly captured the 3-column layout, window dots, nav items with ⌘N/⌘P/⌘K shortcuts, settings categories, paths, version v0.8.2, and right-panel sections. The single universal error is misreading the truncated final REMOTE provider (GT: x.AI) — variants wrote 'vLLM' or 'vAI', all treated as key_misses per strict rules. Genuine fabrications are confined to two responses inventing an 'ML'/'ML:' prefix on the MLX icon (t0.4 rep0, t0.7 rep1) and one asserting specific per-provider icon color assignments as verified fact (t0.1 rep2). Three responses (t0.4 rep0, t0.4 rep1, t0.7 rep1) were truncated mid-output. rep1 t0.1 ranks highest because it is the only response that avoided guessing the clipped label while remaining complete and accurate elsewhere.
